title: Of a Comb, a Prayer Book, Sugar Cubes, & Lice
author: Shana Fogarty
description: Of a Comb, a Prayer Book, Sugar Cubes & Lice is Shana Fogarty Shah's oral history of her grandmother Elizabeth Blum Goldstein, a Hungarian Jew who survived six concentration camps as a teenager, lost most of her family, and was liberated at 19 weighing 54 pounds. A witness against forgetting.
